textByHash.7482d1cecef1c8ef0eecf65a13c0353f0f482633: That I do. But I must say you seem quite familiar too.
textByHash.600e0f0a9143d9ddbb1761af7ad689de7ce78480: Why! You're that insolent fool who insulted my navigational skills!
textByHash.01aec020452832478a8d8addd164743b89612d35: Accusing me of navigating in circles!
textByHash.30b0b37b96014227499ccb7c430df2932a4106c9: How dare you! It was a jinx.
textByHash.bf17bdd44710f632fa7188fdc2ec62b5d1cc6f8c: Oh, behold the great adventurer . How the world would crumble without her.
textByHash.956d2cfbb2e3551a0e80a7e397cb92cd4acf67b1: Why, you have a problem with it?
textByHash.a2357c1ed12f452eb1b37191018206f7f5dab0bb: How dare you! I'll have you know that the job of a banker is far more exciting than that of a pirate!
textByHash.67dabaec7a8475f131398f4fd424e1ea51c0fa55: It is! And it's an honest living.
textByHash.882e6b5eab23097d741f8bd1552a37c06972190c: I was tired of looting and hunting for treasure. It was time to turn my life around.
textByHash.783ae87fd6a6d82275fb2315a6b202f443510be1: I suppose you had better take this chest to carry his stuff. Don't want you losing any of it.
textByHash.d13cb3fd4d7ecbf1a3a36886deb504d95b1d670e: Ah, I would if you had any space.
textByHash.645c68e62b407a0cf74ea84510b34e090ba4f51a: Okay. You best help him quickly or else I'll be after you!
textByHash.37960011036bab29ed6ef565f560b6cabd7e4605: Ah, you can't unless you have the chest.
textByHash.bb7066c50b238e1f531992d58e117218860d3ab4: Well, I don't suppose it would be a problem to give you another. Here you go.
textByHash.18097e3a050f19f44efc77ecc358ad248d07df15: Don't think that this means I like you now!
textByHash.0241e955839dd96316655dceae9e18be337fe8cb: Me? I'm the navigator. My job is to ensure the ship travels where it's supposed to go once it's moving by constantly checking our
textByHash.2da0bad1a97b91ee3d9b6567e77a31dd2a15aa34: bearings against our plotted course, using charts and a sextant.
textByHash.9806079626e12e4cf454d8f0e25f341445331b31: People often think that we just sail off when we feel like it, but its actually far more complicated than that!
textByHash.9022ada59f5331b95ebc16173b7f72e1c3cdd864: Why, when you think of just how much sea there is out there, ANYTHING could happen if there wasn't a competent navigator on board ensuring that we reach our destination safely and in the shortest possible time!
textByHash.41d40476ae14c8f6aeb2dbffa970e21e6fa19d35: As I say, being a navigator is a real skill - you really have to think on your feet!
textByHash.39c5062790be3fd08b3efa156dc74be683a03291: Yesiree, once we get sailing, it's all up to me to make sure we don't run into trouble or go off course!
textByHash.ecb03621ce3089285a6b0ccb0bcb723c62941526: Yep, as the rest of the crew basically stand around not doing much, I'll be the one in the cabin, comparing wind speeds, landmarks and charts with my sextant, making sure that we get to the destination on time, and on
textByHash.03ba75acccb1a70ba05878bdada0fc88cf6f4611: You could almost say that I'm the linchpin of the entire operation! Why, if it wasn't for me, the rest of the guys might be sailing for, oooh, hours, and be slightly off course and
textByHash.229b88d564eac683c66c5eb065174e963fbe8f91: They might even be a few hours late for their destination! Or a few miles down the road from it!
textByHash.5c4a3704c3ba0c0e3052eba462e262037eafa238: And then where would they be?
textByHash.bee97ff20f2dc1cfedbc0b5df8a3ce6f9ea1c4fe: Oh, just relaxing while I wait for the ship to cast off.
textByHash.d3856ac2cfd3756b8dc5aae45340d293b988fff6: When we're sailing I'll be very busy you know! I'm probably the single most important person on board when we're sailing!
textByHash.e1ecfe87fb3a0ab6e814373f7da481189e2d2036: What do you want, spoken to the captain yet?
textByHash.332448d26921be43f60281aab398e15d8d4f6e09: I'm SURE I don't know what you mean!
textByHash.57bf1049303de75fccf445bf5552b0279fa729df: Now listen here bucko, my course was true, like all of my others, and if you have a problem with how I do my job, then you'd better go and speak to the Captain about it, because I don't appreciate a stowaway
textByHash.f9914a848960a4117de5f1f3a86b05e79a740d35: wandering in here and criticising me!
textByHash.3b771adc8ab6d65c520351a2d05b5b3747eea34e: Frankly sirrah your rudeness is quite appalling!
textByHash.bc061bdd06ec42e6b1fb9707e8e64faf5ebf3507: My calculations and plotted course were expertly calculated, and there can be only one reason why the ship has failed to arrive at its expected destination.
textByHash.2f4721fee5efe2b62260f0f97179b194bca0887c: I do not have to take this kind of abuse from a common stowaway!
textByHash.d9c0484722e271010c3e976b5a5fc688d76400f8: Really? You don't seem like the type he would make friends with.
textByHash.213d4e315b065d8ec11a766468bb7be3967c8e7d: No you didn't. You called him Captain Renney.
textByHash.dda01ff9c661d7625351439c9637d35060cc0d2e: Yet I have known him for over 20 years and he has never asked to be referred to as anything except Captain Bentley.
textByHash.55e10f421f04e59e84c84d3caff260aa37a723be: And indeed, he has never mentioned any stowaway looking vagabonds as friends.
textByHash.127747a1c54439ee690a47ff0bc242ce1ac394e3: Look, see for yourself! All co-ordinates for the journey are carefully plotted to all visible waypoints and landmasses!
textByHash.bd33d954266d69271353b7cfc3af92b3d157b70d: There can only be one POSSIBLE explanation why the ship hasn't reached its destination, as I mentioned before!
textByHash.66ec0888115b8a93b78d623d92827a69f6babd50: Magic. It must be magic. Somebody must have jinxed our ship, but I have no idea who would have done that or why.
textByHash.202e8c8296561342bf66048d383ae09f16348d8c: Although your highly suspicious behaviour towards me, and mysterious sudden appearance on board at the *exact time* that this jinx appears to have been brought upon us would seem to make you the obvious candidate.
textByHash.517d716ec249f92ab1a593130b7da8efe878a7d4: And we all know what we do to someone who is a jinx.
textByHash.85ce323d61e13eb6da2809192c8b39758b918b67: Oh, I'm sure your good friend Captain Bentley has told you all about the last jinx we had on board.
textByHash.a885726430feb5e2ce2406e5877ee75efa4eabde: Oh, it was horrible. I never knew the human body could contain so many mackerel.
textByHash.409a99ad940e379565adc07c4e38564cd3c903bf: And then that thing they did with the tinderbox and the cheese... I still wake up with nightmares about that sometimes...
textByHash.df10014a08271ec07dcc565137e54236e38b7d53: What? I'm not a jinx, we've already had this discussion!
textByHash.a984c98acd232faf0a260ab41ad3f8b463ce0585: I think a more subtle approach might yield you better results.
textByHash.e6f6a8172e3f3f204fd7bed613947794c7629ad4: This seems once again an effort on your behalf to throw the trail away from your own jinxed self bringing us misfortune.
textByHash.35ade11efc683098f761bfd17e3cbe65b8c4573b: I am the very model of self-restraint. As you should have realised by now, as I haven't yet given the order to have you put to death. Yet.
textByHash.c363d8d8dc0dd5a8d4c20b7efd15a57af991b0e4: Yes. I suggest you check elsewhere.
textByHash.8e530076780fb82809b9a0d3b9726f6dfd888ad3: Yes, and I certainly have my eye on you.
textByHash.c5f53b4721ecb885f04c0aff4331da3382e3f7af: How is that an admission of guilt???
textByHash.103b084035fb6cc6638978e311f505ea7605ab11: What's to deny??? You haven't asked me anything!
textByHash.1d6017e1696b583256eeccec54984bdebf858afa: (sigh) Please... Please just ask me your questions then leave me alone...
textByHash.0f6e414633d7ca6ec8d90f398df38e0311006100: Um... yes, how could I not have been at the feast the whole time that I was at the feast?
textByHash.07d295856fd3f2dc25628a3ba28970c28cf821b0: Look, I've had just about enough of you!
textByHash.c2d7506ff9d8f72f638561c16779badcc629c3f7: ' I'm not even going to dignify that with a response, you have come in here with a string of falsehoods against me, and apparently have some vendetta against me for some reason unknown to me, when I think it's pretty
textByHash.a0b5c0d62e759e0066bec2dd42fd5194a0ff7f44: clear that if anybody is a jinx on this ship it is you!
textByHash.4ae1dbe3a8b0f6de5d6a183389e516cb841d5b8c: Confess to WHAT exactly??? I have done nothing wrong!
textByHash.ce024631a73bf63eb8b70dfd516cfce825aa2408: I went to a feast on Lunar Isle, I stayed with the rest of the crew the whole night, I didn't see anyone offending them, and I didn't do anything to offend them myself!
textByHash.ff5af835377a5f1e860cdda17ad61b233cf0f543: That's your way of apologising for falsely accusing me of all that stuff earlier is it?
textByHash.7f8751d5dd7585790f18f65f4ead3acd48dbe553: Wait, you mean you're saying you think the First Mate has done this???
textByHash.6665d3627ae604e64a2a3d13b90f0baa07ae8702: No. No way. You're even more off base with your crazy assumptions than ever.
textByHash.7157d55358854e20ba7b177cf01c45702ef2b007: I wish you would make your mind up, or are you just going to go around accusing everyone?
textByHash.7071fde86263663fcf7bd776ebd41751c63995ea: Your powers of investigation are impressive, for sure.
textByHash.9c3db76ea8ffc828049d79eb9a8d005bf2eeb99b: Best you get a move on then. My reputation as a navigator is at stake!
textByHash.86341205ee84580e6fa34bf5dd9d26810f45215c: That kind of order can only come from the Captain, I'm afraid. Go speak with him.
textByHash.a1022cd8d12eb77582c85116bf02fef0c78782bd: Well there's a good remedy for that.
textByHash.2a4ad04a3cd1df8edbce448c564e080e67b0df6a: This is a branch of the Bank of Gielinor. We have branches in many towns.
textByHash.781a0067d1995aab06ce84a10c586ea4e76e06d0: We will look after your items and money for you. Leave your valuables with us if you want to keep them safe.
